member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation
member.summary: Represents the root XML documentation structure for a .NET assembly.
member.remarks: This class parses and contains all the XML documentation for a single assembly, including all types, members, and their associated documentation elements. It provides methods to access and filter documentation by various criteria.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.AssemblyName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the assembly this documentation belongs to.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.Members
member.summary: Gets the collection of all documented members in the assembly.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.Types
member.summary: Gets the collection of all documented types in the assembly.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.Methods
member.summary: Gets the collection of all documented methods in the assembly.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.Properties
member.summary: Gets the collection of all documented properties in the assembly.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.Fields
member.summary: Gets the collection of all documented fields in the assembly.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.Events
member.summary: Gets the collection of all documented events in the assembly.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlDocumentationDocument class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XDocument)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlDocumentationDocument class from an XML document.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.GetTypesByNamespace(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all types within a specific namespace.
member.returns: A dictionary of types in the specified namespace.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.GetMembersByType(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all members belonging to a specific type.
member.param: The fully qualified type name (without T: prefix).
member.returns: A dictionary of members belonging to the specified type.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.AssemblyXmlDocumentation.GetNamespaces
member.summary: Gets all unique namespaces represented in the documentation.
member.returns: A list of unique namespace names.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlCodeBlockElement
member.summary: Represents a code block XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The code element contains code examples or snippets. It is typically rendered as a formatted code block with syntax highlighting.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlCodeBlockElement.Language
member.summary: Gets or sets the programming language for syntax highlighting.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlCodeBlockElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlCodeBlockElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlCodeBlockElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlCodeBlockElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlCodeBlockElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this code block element to MDX format with syntax highlighting.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this code block.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlCodeElement
member.summary: Represents an inline code XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The c element marks text as inline code within documentation. It is typically rendered with monospace font and different styling.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlCodeElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlCodeElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlCodeElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlCodeElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlCodeElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this inline code element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this inline code.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement
member.summary: Represents a base XML documentation element with common properties.
member.remarks: This abstract class provides the foundation for all XML documentation elements, including summary, remarks, parameters, returns, and other documentation tags. It handles parsing of XML content and preserves the original structure for conversion to MDX format.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement.RawXml
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw XML content of the element.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement.Text
member.summary: Gets or sets the parsed text content of the element.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement.InnerElements
member.summary: Gets or sets the inner XML elements for nested content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlDocumentationElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlDocumentationElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement.ParseInnerElements(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Parses inner XML elements recursively.
member.param: The parent XML element to parse.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement.CreateDocumentationElement(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Creates the appropriate documentation element based on the XML element name.
member.returns: The appropriate documentation element, or null if not supported.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this element.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlExampleElement
member.summary: Represents an example XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The example element contains code examples that demonstrate how to use a type or member. It can contain both description text and code blocks.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlExampleElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlExampleElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlExampleElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlExampleElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlExampleElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this example element to MDX format with proper code formatting.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this example.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlExceptionElement
member.summary: Represents an exception XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The exception element documents exceptions that can be thrown by a method or property. It includes the exception type and conditions under which it is thrown.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlExceptionElement.Cref
member.summary: Gets or sets the fully qualified name of the exception type.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlExceptionElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlExceptionElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlExceptionElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlExceptionElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlExceptionElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this exception element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this exception.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlGenericElement
member.summary: Represents a generic XML documentation element for unrecognized tags.
member.remarks: This class handles XML documentation elements that don't have specific implementations. It provides basic text extraction and formatting capabilities for any XML element.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlGenericElement.ElementName
member.summary: Gets or sets the XML element name.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlGenericElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlGenericElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlGenericElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlGenericElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlGenericElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this generic element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this element.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlListElement
member.summary: Represents a list XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The list element creates bulleted or numbered lists within documentation. It supports different list types including bullet, number, and table formats.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlListElement.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of list (bullet, number, table).

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlListElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlListElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlListElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlListElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlListElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this list element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this list.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember
member.summary: Represents a documented member from XML documentation.
member.remarks: This class contains all the documentation elements for a single member, including summary, remarks, parameters, return values, exceptions, and examples. It provides methods to convert the documentation to various formats.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the full member name with prefix (e.g., T:System.String, M:System.String.Length).

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.MemberType
member.summary: Gets or sets the member type (Type, Method, Property, Field, Event).

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.Summary
member.summary: Gets or sets the summary documentation element.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.Remarks
member.summary: Gets or sets the remarks documentation element.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.Parameters
member.summary: Gets the collection of parameter documentation elements.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.TypeParameters
member.summary: Gets the collection of type parameter documentation elements.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.Returns
member.summary: Gets or sets the returns documentation element.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the value documentation element (for properties).

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.Exceptions
member.summary: Gets the collection of exception documentation elements.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.Examples
member.summary: Gets the collection of example documentation elements.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.SeeAlso
member.summary: Gets the collection of see also references.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.Permissions
member.summary: Gets the collection of permission documentation elements.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlMember class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlMember class from an XML element.
member.param: The XML member element to parse.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.GetSimpleName
member.summary: Gets the simple name of the member without prefix and namespace.
member.returns: The simple member name.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.GetNamespace
member.summary: Gets the namespace of the member.
member.returns: The namespace name.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlMember.GetContainingType
member.summary: Gets the containing type name for members.
member.returns: The containing type name, or empty string for types.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.MemberType
member.summary: Enumeration of member types in XML documentation.

member.name: F:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.MemberType.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown member type.

member.name: F:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.MemberType.Type
member.summary: Type (class, interface, struct, enum, delegate).

member.name: F:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.MemberType.Method
member.summary: Method or constructor.

member.name: F:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.MemberType.Property
member.summary: Property or indexer.

member.name: F:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.MemberType.Field
member.summary: Field or constant.

member.name: F:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.MemberType.Event
member.summary: Event.

member.name: F:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.MemberType.Namespace
member.summary: Namespace.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParagraphElement
member.summary: Represents a paragraph XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The para element represents a paragraph break within documentation text. It is used to separate sections of content for better readability.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParagraphElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlParagraphElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParagraphElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlParagraphElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParagraphElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this paragraph element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this paragraph.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParameterElement
member.summary: Represents a parameter XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The param element describes a parameter of a method, constructor, or indexer. It includes the parameter name and description of its purpose and usage.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParameterElement.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the parameter.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParameterElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlParameterElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParameterElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlParameterElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParameterElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this parameter element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this parameter.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParamRefElement
member.summary: Represents a paramref XML documentation element for parameter references.
member.remarks: The paramref element creates a reference to a parameter within the documentation. It is used to refer to parameters inline within text.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParamRefElement.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the referenced parameter.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParamRefElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlParamRefElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParamRefElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlParamRefElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlParamRefElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this paramref element to MDX format as inline code.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this parameter reference.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlPermissionElement
member.summary: Represents a permission XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The permission element documents the security permissions required to access or use a particular type or member.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlPermissionElement.Cref
member.summary: Gets or sets the permission type reference.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlPermissionElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlPermissionElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlPermissionElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlPermissionElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlPermissionElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this permission element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this permission requirement.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlRemarksElement
member.summary: Represents a remarks XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The remarks element provides additional detailed information about a type or member. It is typically displayed after the summary and can contain more extensive explanations, usage notes, or implementation details.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlRemarksElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlRemarksElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlRemarksElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlRemarksElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlRemarksElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this remarks element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of these remarks.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlReturnsElement
member.summary: Represents a returns XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The returns element describes the return value of a method or property. It explains what the method returns and under what conditions.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlReturnsElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlReturnsElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlReturnsElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlReturnsElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlReturnsElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this returns element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this returns description.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeAlsoElement
member.summary: Represents a seealso XML documentation element for related references.
member.remarks: The seealso element creates a link to related types or members. These are typically displayed in a "See Also" section.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeAlsoElement.Cref
member.summary: Gets or sets the cross-reference target.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeAlsoElement.LinkText
member.summary: Gets or sets the link text to display.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeAlsoElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlSeeAlsoElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeAlsoElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlSeeAlsoElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeAlsoElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this seealso element to MDX format as a link.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this related reference.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeElement
member.summary: Represents a see XML documentation element for cross-references.
member.remarks: The see element creates a link to another type or member within the documentation. It is used for inline cross-references within text.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeElement.Cref
member.summary: Gets or sets the cross-reference target.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeElement.LinkText
member.summary: Gets or sets the link text to display.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlSeeElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlSeeElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this see element to MDX format as a link.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this cross-reference.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSummaryElement
member.summary: Represents a summary XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The summary element provides a brief description of a type or member. It is typically displayed prominently in documentation and should be concise but informative.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSummaryElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlSummaryElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSummaryElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlSummaryElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSummaryElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this summary element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this summary.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParameterElement
member.summary: Represents a type parameter XML documentation element.
member.remarks: The typeparam element describes a generic type parameter. It includes the parameter name and description of its constraints and usage.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParameterElement.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the type parameter.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParameterElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlTypeParameterElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParameterElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlTypeParameterElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParameterElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this type parameter element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this type parameter.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParamRefElement
member.summary: Represents a typeparamref XML documentation element for type parameter references.
member.remarks: The typeparamref element creates a reference to a generic type parameter within the documentation. It is used to refer to type parameters inline within text.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParamRefElement.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the referenced type parameter.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParamRefElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlTypeParamRefElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParamRefElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlTypeParamRefElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlTypeParamRefElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this typeparamref element to MDX format as inline code.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this type parameter reference.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlValueElement
member.summary: Represents a value XML documentation element for properties.
member.remarks: The value element describes the value that a property represents. It is used primarily for properties to explain what the property value means.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlValueElement.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlValueElement class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlValueElement.#ctor(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the XmlValueElement class with XML content.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlValueElement.ToMdx
member.summary: Converts this value element to MDX format.
member.returns: The MDX representation of this value description.
